name: Branch Dropdown UI
summary: Frontend dropdown component for listing, switching, and creating Git branches
goals: Provide a searchable branch dropdown with create and switch functionality
Show current branch and allow quick switching

specDetail.description: A BranchDropdown component that displays the current Git branch and provides a searchable dropdown of all branches. Supports switching branches, creating new branches from the current HEAD, and shows branch status indicators.

parameters.name: branches
parameters.description: List of all branches with metadata

parameters.name: onBranchSwitch
parameters.description: Callback when a branch is selected for switching

parameters.name: onBranchCreate
parameters.description: Callback to create a new branch

constraints: Must show local and remote branches in separate sections
Must confirm before switching branches with uncommitted changes
Must validate new branch names against Git naming rules

acceptanceCriteria.given: a project is a Git repository with multiple branches
acceptanceCriteria.when: the user opens the branch dropdown and selects a different branch
acceptanceCriteria.then: the working tree is switched to the selected branch

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
